violation_type: HCE catch-up not coded as Roth

correction_hint: Review HCE catch-up contribution configuration and ensure all HCE catch-up amounts are coded as Roth contributions per Secure 2.0 requirements. Coordinate with payroll and recordkeeper to correct source coding and consult plan document provisions as needed.

violation_type: Potential catch-up coded in base deferral source
